description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a game is on the schedule with broadcasters
AND the `mediaState` for the feeds is set to `MEDIA_OFF`

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile on tomorrows date
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Modal displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> @ <home_team>, You’re a bit early!, There are no feeds available yet. Please come back later. Press back to dismiss."
